name: swarm-discussion
description: Aggregator marketplace for the swarm-discussion plugin family. Each host adapter lives in its own repository around the shared swarm-discussion-runtime; this repo only points at certified adapter releases.

plugins.name: swarm-discussion
plugins.description: Claude adapter: the parent projects per-topic custom expert agents and dispatches a swarm-coordinator background session that runs a multi-expert discussion over the vendored runtime and returns only the synthesis. Keeps discussion mechanics out of the parent context window.
